acceptance_criteria.criterion: Already handled skill entrypoint consolidations are no longer reported as open analyzer candidates.
acceptance_criteria.proof: The analyzer now reports zero open consolidation_candidates and eight resolved_consolidations for the current catalog.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Resolved consolidations are explicit and auditable.
acceptance_criteria.proof: skills/CATALOG.json declares consolidation_groups for initialization, maintenance, evidence/upgrade, design, memory, and quality entrypoints.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Analyzer JSON and text output document the distinction between resolved and open consolidation work.
acceptance_criteria.proof: tools/analyze_skill_catalog.py now emits resolved_consolidations in JSON and a resolved consolidations section in text output.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Invalid consolidation metadata is caught by tests.
acceptance_criteria.proof: tests/test_skill_catalog_analyzer.py covers unknown skill references inside consolidation_groups.

docs_refresh.reason: Catalog and analyzer output contract now include resolved consolidation groups.
